name: metricasboss-ds
description: Design System do Métricas Boss — componentes reutilizáveis para páginas de analytics e web

ArticleHero.name: ArticleHero
ArticleHero.description: A full article header with category badge, title, description, author info, read time, share dropdown, and a featured image.

category.description: Category badge label displayed above the title

authorAvatar.description: Avatar image URL of the author

readTime.description: Estimated reading time, e.g. '5 min de leitura'

image.description: Featured image URL displayed below the meta info

examples.title: Como configurar eventos personalizados no GA4
examples.description: Aprenda a rastrear interacoes especificas dos usuarios no seu site com eventos personalizados do Google Analytics 4.

AuthorCard.name: AuthorCard
AuthorCard.description: A card displaying an author's profile with avatar, name, role, bio, LinkedIn link, article count, and category tags.

slug.description: URL slug for the author profile page

role.description: Professional role or title of the author

avatarUrl.description: URL of the author's avatar image

linkedinUrl.description: URL to the author's LinkedIn profile

articleCount.description: Number of articles written by the author

categories.description: List of category names the author writes about

examples.name: Lucian Fialho
examples.bio: Especialista em analytics e dados digitais com mais de 10 anos de experiencia no mercado.

BlogCard.name: BlogCard
BlogCard.description: A card component for displaying blog post previews with cover image, category badge, title, description, author info, and read time.

slug.description: URL slug for the blog post

image.description: Cover image URL for the blog post

category.description: Category label displayed as a badge on the image

description.description: Short excerpt or description of the blog post

authorName.description: Name of the blog post author

authorAvatar.description: Avatar image URL of the author

readTime.description: Estimated reading time, e.g. '5 min de leitura'

examples.title: Como configurar o GA4 do zero em 2025
examples.description: Um guia completo para configurar o Google Analytics 4 e comecar a coletar dados de forma confiavel.

Breadcrumb.name: Breadcrumb
Breadcrumb.description: A navigation breadcrumb trail showing the current page hierarchy with chevron separators.

label.description: Display text for the breadcrumb item

href.description: URL link for the breadcrumb item. If omitted, renders as plain text (current page).

CategoryCard.name: CategoryCard
CategoryCard.description: A card displaying a content category with an icon, name, description, and article/author count stats.

slug.description: URL slug for the category page

articleCount.description: Number of articles in this category

authorCount.description: Number of authors writing in this category

examples.name: Analytics
examples.description: Tudo sobre Google Analytics, metricas e analise de dados para o seu negocio digital.

CtaSection.name: CtaSection
CtaSection.description: A call-to-action section with title, description, and primary/secondary action buttons. Supports default and card variants.

title.description: Main heading for the CTA section

primaryAction.description: Label for the primary action button

primaryHref.description: URL for the primary action button

secondaryAction.description: Label for the secondary action button

secondaryHref.description: URL for the secondary action button

variant.description: Visual variant: 'default' renders inline, 'card' wraps in a bordered card

examples.title: Pronto para transformar seus dados em decisoes?
examples.description: Agende uma consultoria gratuita e descubra como podemos ajudar o seu negocio.

examples.title: Baixe nosso guia gratuito
examples.description: O guia completo de GA4 para iniciantes.

FaqSection.name: FaqSection
FaqSection.description: A frequently asked questions section with a title and a list of question/answer pairs separated by dividers.

items.question: Esse servico funciona apenas para site?
items.answer: Nao, nos trabalhamos tanto com sites quanto com aplicativos. Na consultoria, tambem prestamos analise para canais do YouTube e a criacao de dashboards de visualizacoes de dados.

items.question: Ele serve apenas para ecommerce?
items.answer: Nao. Se voce tem uma marca no digital, voce tem metricas para analisar. Os nossos analistas adaptam os seus insights de acordo com o negocio dos clientes.

items.question: Posso contratar apenas a consultoria?
items.answer: A consultoria requer que a auditoria seja feita previamente. Isso garante que os dados analisados sejam confiaveis.

HeroSection.name: HeroSection
HeroSection.description: A full-width hero section with headline, description, call-to-action button, and an optional image. Supports location/date badges above the title.

title.description: The main headline text for the hero section

description.description: Supporting description text below the title

ctaLink.description: URL the call-to-action button links to

imageUrl.description: URL for the hero image displayed on the right

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the hero image

locals.description: Array of location/date strings displayed above the title

examples.title: Analytics Summit 2025
examples.description: O maior evento de analytics do Brasil. Aprenda com os melhores profissionais do mercado.

MaterialCard.name: MaterialCard
MaterialCard.description: A card for displaying downloadable materials with cover image, category badge, title, description, and an external link action.

image.description: Cover image URL for the material

category.description: Category label displayed as a badge on the image

downloadUrl.description: External URL where the material can be downloaded

examples.title: Guia Completo de GA4
examples.description: Um guia passo a passo para configurar e utilizar o Google Analytics 4 no seu site ou aplicativo.

NewsletterSection.name: NewsletterSection
NewsletterSection.description: A newsletter subscription section with decorative blur effects, title, description, and an embedded Substack signup form.

title.description: Heading text for the newsletter section

substackUrl.description: Base Substack URL for the embed iframe, e.g. 'https://lucianfialho.substack.com'

examples.title: Anti Achismo Social Club
examples.description: Menos achismo, mais dados. Sem enrolacao toda semana na sua caixa de entrada.
